more.title: Leinster Rout Bulls 36-7 to Retain URC Title as Pretoria Franchise Suffers Fourth Final Defeat
more.description: DUBLIN, IRELAND — Leinster emphatically retained their United Rugby Championship (URC) title on Friday, June 19, 2026, with a ruthless 36-7 demolition of the Vodacom Bulls at Croke Park. The crushing defeat marked a somber milestone for the South African franchise, as they suffered their fourth loss in four URC Grand Final appearances. In a [...]

more.title: VW invests R40m a year to help tackle youth unemployment
more.description: Volkswagen Group Africa (VWGA) has welcomed 675 new trainees into the Youth Employment Service (YES) programme this year, reaffirming its commitment to tackling youth unemployment and skills development in South Africa. The automotive manufacturer invests approximately R40 million annually in the initiative, which provides young people with workplace experience and training opportunities aimed at improving [...]

more.title: SAHRC Takes Ngizwe Mchunu to Johannesburg High Court Over LGBTQ+ Hate Speech
more.description: JOHANNESBURG, GAUTENG — The South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) is taking media personality Ngizwe Mchunu to the Johannesburg High Court over allegations of LGBTQ+ hate speech and incitement. The legal action stems from a series of controversial remarks made by Mchunu regarding same-sex couples, sparking a national debate on the balance between freedom of [...]

more.title: Hugo Broos ties Shakes Mashaba as ‘most-capped’ Bafana Bafana coach
more.description: Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos has tied Shakes Mashaba as the coach to have been in charge of the most matches of the South African national team.

more.title: R100k fine for employing illegal immigrants: What the law actually says
more.description: The R100 000 figure making headlines is not yet law. Here is how to tell the two apart. Two laws, one conversation If you have seen the R100 000 fine warning circulating online, you are not alone. The figure has been widely reported in recent weeks and while it is rooted in a real legislative development, there is an important... more.description: The future of AI in South Africa is in local, distributed infrastructure closer to where data is created and used.
